evidence.detail: SQLi at /search — shows all results — authentication bypass. Response length: 10610 bytes
SQLi at /search — comments out password check. Response length: 10613 bytes
SQL injection bypasses login authentication entirely

probe_result.vuln_description: SQL Injection: unsanitised user input is inserted directly into SQL queries, allowing auth bypass and data extraction.
probe_result.recommendation: Use parameterised queries / prepared statements. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.
